title: [v5.1] Add Hyper-V option in windows installer
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #22506

/assign l0rd

```release-note
Windows installer `podman-setup.exe` supports 3 new command line variables:
- `MachineProvider`: choose the podman machine virtualization provider (can be `wsl` or `hyperv`, the default is `wsl`).
- `HyperVCheckbox`: if set to `1` the installation installs Hyper-V (the default is `0`)
- `SkipConfigFileCreation`: if set to `1` the installation skips the creation of  `%PROGRAMDATA%\containers\containers.conf.d\99-podman-machine-provider.conf` (the default is `0`)
```
